iar a españolSorry for not being able to answer them all. There are too many people in my message tray and I will briefly explain them to everyone. To begin I will explain why orie chef is not Real. As it seems, they have spread many stories through which it is spoken that this profile of facebook is cursed or it is very rare that it publishes sadistic things and for some tenebrous ones. This profile and this legend is a complete lie I have had conversations with this profile (images in my previous publication) and when I ask a question she answers me with total normality. It was said that she told you things that can not be understood. but not ... she even told me about the trap music and after I lost the fear she tried to intimidate me even though she did not get it. It is a person who pretends to be pictures of an unknown lady and only tries to cause fear and panic. I set out to help the Philippines and believe me they should no longer be afraid of him. It is absolutely false! I am telling you my experience. Keep sharing this publication so that your country finds out about all this. Love to the beautiful country of filipina
